parameters.jsonBody: ={"chat_id":{{ $json.chat_id }},"text":"Unauthorized. Contact your admin to get access."}

parameters.jsCode:
const input=$input.first().json;const text=input.text||'';const chatId=input.chat_id;const dt=$vars.DEFAULT_TENANT_ID||'kahuna';const cm=text.match(/^/([\w]+)(?:\s+(.*))?$/);if(cm){const cmd='/'+cm[1].toLowerCase();const arg=(cm[2]||'').trim();if(cmd==='/help')return[{json:{type:'command',chat_id:chatId,response:'Ascend GTM Bot

Commands:
/help - Show this message
/status - Platform health check
/pulse - Quick platform pulse check
/spend - Ad spend summary
/leads - Lead generation report
/domains - List available domains
/actions [domain] - List domain actions
/tenant - Tenant routing info

Usage: Type your goal naturally.
Prefix with tenant name to target:
kahuna check HubSpot contacts'}}];if(cmd==='/status')return[{json:{type:'goal',chat_id:chatId,goal:'Get platform health status and report any issues',tenant_id:dt}}];if(cmd==='/pulse')return[{json:{type:'goal',chat_id:chatId,goal:'Quick platform pulse check - summarize system health, active workflows, and any alerts',tenant_id:dt}}];if(cmd==='/spend')return[{json:{type:'goal',chat_id:chatId,goal:'Get ad spend summary across all platforms including Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and Meta Ads with totals and trends',tenant_id:dt}}];if(cmd==='/leads')return[{json:{type:'goal',chat_id:chatId,goal:'Generate lead generation report with counts, sources, conversion rates, and pipeline status',tenant_id:dt}}];if(cmd==='/domains')return[{json:{type:'goal',chat_id:chatId,goal:'List all available domains and their action counts',tenant_id:dt}}];if(cmd==='/actions'&&arg)return[{json:{type:'goal',chat_id:chatId,goal:'List all available actions for the '+arg+' domain',tenant_id:dt}}];if(cmd==='/tenant')return[{json:{type:'command',chat_id:chatId,response:'Tenant Routing
Default: '+dt+'

Prefix your message with tenant name:
kahuna get CRM contacts
codiac check pipeline
ascend list workflows'}}];return[{json:{type:'command',chat_id:chatId,response:'Unknown command: '+cmd+'
Type /help for available commands.'}}];}let tid=dt;if(/ codiac /i.test(text))tid='codiac';if(/ ascend /i.test(text))tid='ascend';if(/ kahuna /i.test(text))tid='kahuna';const goal=text.replace(/ (kahuna|codiac|ascend) /gi,'').trim();if(!goal)return[{json:{type:'command',chat_id:chatId,response:'Please provide a goal or type /help for commands.'}}];return[{json:{type:'goal',chat_id:chatId,goal,tenant_id:tid}}];
